title: phlox variabilis subsp. nudata
intro: Phlox variabilis subsp. nudata, also known as the Naked Phlox, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polemoniaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Phlox variabilis subsp. nudata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
